name: @appstrate/kijiji
description: Kijiji.ca connector on the connect.tool (run-start) model. At connect, only the email/password login secret is stored (encrypted). At each run the sidecar runs the `login` MCP tool, which performs the real CAS + OAuth dance (GET /api/auth/csrf -> POST /api/auth/signin/cis -> follow redirects to the CAS form on id.kijiji.ca -> parse hidden execution/service + form action -> POST the CAS form with {{email}}/{{password}} substituted PROXY-SIDE -> follow redirects back to www.kijiji.ca -> GET /api/auth/session to validate). The login tool maintains its OWN cookie jar and follows redirects, capturing the session cookies (kj-st, kj-at, kj-ct) from real Set-Cookie headers plus the account id (sub) from /api/auth/session. The login tool never receives the real secret (it sends literal {{email}}/{{password}} placeholders) and is never exposed to the agent. The captured cookies are injected by the MITM as a single `Cookie` header on the agent-facing `whoami` tool. KNOWN LIMITATION: the captured cookies are a point-in-time snapshot; Kijiji rotates kj-at (~30 min) so long runs rely on reauthOn:[401] to re-login. A runner-managed cookie jar would be more faithful but requires a substrate change (out of scope). Validated end-to-end against the live Kijiji service.
author: Appstrate

email.description: Kijiji account email. Stored encrypted as the login secret; substituted proxy-side into the {{email}} placeholder. The integration never reads it.

password.description: Kijiji account password. Stored encrypted as the login secret; substituted proxy-side into the {{password}} placeholder. The integration never reads it.
